name: FaceSwapAI Face Swap Research and Open Data Catalog
description: A versioned catalog of reproducible face-swap measurements and dated vendor-claim snapshots with source boundaries and explicit limitations.

datasets.name: Independent Multi-Face Mapping Production Study v1
datasets.description: A reproducible four-person production run recording detector boxes, separate replacement crops, cyclic source-to-target mapping, task states, credit use, hashes, dimensions and cleanup.
datasets.measurementTechnique: One dated production task on one purpose-built synthetic four-adult input, with four expanded replacement portraits and a documented cyclic mapping

datasets.name: AI Face Swap Vendor-Published Claims Snapshot v1
datasets.description: A dated, normalized snapshot of free access, account, watermark, media-support and retention statements on seven official face-swap product pages.
datasets.measurementTechnique: Manual review and normalization of vendor-published product-page statements observed on 2026-07-13; no generation or output-quality test

datasets.name: FaceSwapAI Public Reference Frame Readiness Benchmark
datasets.description: A reproducible audit of eight FaceSwapAI reference frames. It describes observable input properties and does not measure model accuracy or guarantee output quality.
datasets.measurementTechnique: FaceSwapAI Readiness Score v1.0.0 public reference-frame audit

datasets.name: FaceSwapAI Controlled Face-Swap Input Degradation Study
datasets.description: A controlled test of how blur, low resolution, low light, highlight clipping and JPEG block compression change observable preflight measurements while face detection remains successful.
datasets.measurementTechnique: Controlled single-variable image degradation measured with FaceSwapAI Readiness Score v1.1.0 and the production public face detector

datasets.name: FaceSwapAI Controlled Group Photo Face-Size Detection Study
datasets.description: A controlled observation of how many faces the FaceSwapAI production detector returns when the same four-person group photo is resized from 1200 to 32 pixels wide.
datasets.measurementTechnique: Controlled native-width resize series measured with the FaceSwapAI production face detector v1.0

datasets.name: FaceSwapAI Controlled Production Video Face-Swap Study
datasets.description: A controlled, inspectable production run measuring container preservation, sampled face detection, face-box alignment and regional pixel differences across one synthetic 10-second video face swap.
datasets.measurementTechnique: Matched-frame production video audit using ffprobe container data, the FaceSwapAI production public detector v1.0, face-box overlap and decoded regional RGB differences
